title: Charred Crispy Tunisian Kid-Friendly Tagine
description: A kid-friendly twist on traditional Tunisian cuisine, featuring a smoky and crispy tagine.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together smoked olive oil, garlic, cumin, paprika, and coriander. Add the chicken and toss to coat.
Add the onion, cherry tomatoes, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and toss to coat.
Transfer the mixture to a tagine or large oven-safe skillet and cover with foil.
Bake for 25 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and baking it in the oven for a few minutes.
Chop the parsley and sprinkle it over the top of the tagine.
Serve the tagine hot with the pita bread on the side.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
Let the tagine rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
